sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73654" key="o(moio/nomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμοιό-νομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73654.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of like laws,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phint.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23.61a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
